basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad has released the official notification for 1 Manager - Training & Outreach (Project Associate – Operations) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Telangana. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

application_fee.all_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech / M.Sc / M.S. in Science or Engineering or Masters Degree with experience in research facilities, technology services, operations, or scientific organisations OR MBA with experience in operations management, business development, facility management, or technology-driven service organisations.
qualification.details: Manager - Training & Outreach (Project Associate – Operations): M.Tech / M.Sc / M.S. in Science or Engineering or Masters Degree with experience in research facilities, technology services, operations, or scientific organisations. MBA with experience in operations management, business development, facility management, or technology-driven service organisations. Experience in managing training programmes, outreach initiatives, or institutional collaborations in academic, research, or technology environments. Strong ability to engage with diverse stakeholders including academia, industry, and government bodies. Excellent communication, coordination, and organisational skills. Ability to work in multidisciplinary environments and drive engagement outcomes. Prior experience working with government agencies (e.g., DST) or multi-institutional projects. Exposure to both academic/research and industry ecosystems. Experience in scientific outreach and programme management, partnership development and stakeholder engagement, event planning, workshops, and training coordination. Ability to conceptualise and execute growth-oriented outreach strategies.

salary_details.details: Consolidated emoluments between ₹40,000 to ₹60,000 per month.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualifications and experience Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Manager - Training & Outreach (Project Associate – Operations) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Hyderabad Manager - Training & Outreach position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Manager - Training & Outreach (Project Associate – Operations) post at IIT Hyderabad is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.Tech / M.Sc / M.S. in Science or Engineering or a Masters Degree with relevant experience, or an MBA with operations management experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this position is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Manager - Training & Outreach post?
faq.answer: The consolidated emoluments for this role range between ₹40,000 to ₹60,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Manager - Training & Outreach (Project Associate – Operations) at IIT Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted online through the prescribed link provided.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualifications and experience, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position at IIT Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Hyderabad located?
faq.answer: IIT Hyderabad is located in Sangareddy, Telangana, with the pincode 502285.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Experience in managing training programmes, outreach initiatives, institutional collaborations, operations management, business development, or facility management is preferred.
